_comment: SQLTriage query metadata. Loaded by SqlQueryRepository at startup with FileSystemWatcher hot-reload. Edit via Settings page or directly.

_schema.file: relative path under Data/Sql/ to the .sql file
_schema.severity: CRITICAL | HIGH | MEDIUM | LOW | INFO (Information-level findings — excluded from Quick Check scoring, contribute 0 to governance score)
_schema.status: working | broken | deprecated — broken checks skipped at load; resolves 343 vs 489 count ambiguity via per-check flag
_schema.quick: boolean — included in Quick Check ≤60s subset (Information-priority auto-excluded)
_schema.audience: array of dba|it|exec — who sees the translated finding
_schema.governance: optional per-check scoring override {categoryWeight?: number, perFindingCap?: number} — primary scoring binds to check_id; category mapping in governance-weights.json categoryMapping block
_schema.controls: array of compliance control IDs populated by agent pass from evidence_based_findings via Config/control_mappings_lookup.md — e.g. ['SOC2-CC6.1', 'HIPAA-164.312']
_schema.timeoutSec: optional per-check command timeout override; defaults to severity-based value (CRITICAL/HIGH=8s, MEDIUM=12s, HIGH-complexity=20s)
_schema.sourceYamlHash: SHA256 of the source YAML block in consolidated_checks.sql at agent-pass time — CI warns if source changed but entry not regenerated
_schema.wanBanner: optional override for WAN degraded-performance banner text; default: 'Remote server detected — results may take longer on high-latency connections (>15ms RTT)'

VA-001.description: Validates recent backup existence and restore verification per DB
